inputs.label: Initial Investment
inputs.businessContext: Total upfront cost including equipment, installation, and training. Based on capital budgeting standards (NPV, IRR).

inputs.label: Annual Net Cash Inflow
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual incremental cash inflows minus outflows from the investment. Based on discounted cash flow analysis.

inputs.label: Project Lifetime
inputs.businessContext: Expected useful life of the investment. Typical range 1-50 years based on asset depreciation standards (MACRS).

inputs.label: Discount Rate
inputs.businessContext: Cost of capital or required rate of return. Based on CAPM or WACC standards.

inputs.label: Salvage Value
inputs.businessContext: Estimated residual value at end of project lifetime. Based on asset depreciation methods.

inputs.label: Annual Operating Cost
inputs.businessContext: Recurring costs such as maintenance, labor, energy. Based on life cycle costing (ISO 15686).

inputs.label: Annual Revenue Increase
inputs.businessContext: Expected additional revenue from the investment. Based on market analysis and forecasting.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. Used for risk-adjusted ROI. Based on sensitivity analysis standards.

rules: If dataConfidence is 'low', discountRate must be increased by 2% (handled in formulas)

breakdown.totalCashInflows: Total Present Value of Cash Inflows

hiddenLossDrivers: If roiPercent < 0: 'Negative ROI indicates investment destroys value'
If paybackPeriod > projectLifetime: 'Payback period exceeds project lifetime'
suggestedActions: If roiPercent < 0: 'Consider reducing initial investment or increasing revenue projections'
If paybackPeriod > projectLifetime: 'Negotiate longer project lifetime or improve cash flows'
If dataConfidence is low: 'Perform sensitivity analysis and gather more accurate data'
